_note: Statewide / national referral tools shown for EVERY search (and on load). These are screeners/directories to LINK to — not per-ZIP provider records. scope: 'national' shows always; 'MO'/'KS' shows when the searched ZIP is in that state. Edit freely; rendered by the front-end as the 'Statewide help' section.

referrals.name: Dial 211 (United Way)
referrals.what: Free, confidential local referrals for food, utilities, rent, and more — 24/7. Call or text 211.

referrals.name: findhelp (Aunt Bertha)
referrals.what: Search thousands of local assistance programs by ZIP code — food, housing, health, money, care.

referrals.name: BenefitsCheckUp (NCOA)
referrals.what: Free tool to find federal, state, and local benefit programs you may qualify for (good for older adults).

referrals.name: WhyHunger Hunger Hotline
referrals.what: Connects you to local food pantries and meal programs. Call or text.

referrals.name: Find Your Local Food Bank (Feeding America)
referrals.what: Locate the regional food bank serving your area, then its partner pantries.

referrals.name: Missouri 211 (United Way)
referrals.what: Statewide Missouri resource directory — food, utilities, housing, and more.

referrals.name: Missouri Benefits / Apply for SNAP & Energy Help (MO DSS)
referrals.what: Apply for food (SNAP), energy assistance (LIHEAP), and other Missouri benefits.

referrals.name: Kansas Benefits / Apply for SNAP & LIEAP (KS DCF)
referrals.what: Apply for food assistance (SNAP), energy assistance (LIEAP), and other Kansas benefits.

referrals.name: Kansas 211 / United Way
referrals.what: Local Kansas referrals for food, utilities, housing, and more — dial 211.

_regional_note: Area-specific resource directories / navigators, matched by zone_id (the 6 collection zones). Shown in a 'Regional Resources' section when the searched ZIP is in a listed zone. Populated by the regional-directories workflow.

regional.name: MARC Aging and Adult Services (Area Agency on Aging)
regional.what: The Kansas City region's Area Agency on Aging, helping older adults and caregivers find meals, transportation, in-home support, and long-term care resources.

regional.name: My Resource Connection (Johnson County, KS - Information and Community Resources)
regional.what: Johnson County's community resource directory connecting Kansas-side residents to hundreds of local agencies for housing, healthcare, employment, and human services.

regional.name: United Way 211 Greater Kansas City (info page)
regional.what: The free, 24/7 information-and-referral hub for the 23-county Kansas City region, linking callers and web visitors to vetted community and human services.

regional.name: United Way of Greater Kansas City 211 - Resource Directory
regional.what: Searchable online directory connecting bi-state Kansas City residents to over 7,000 local services for food, housing, utilities, healthcare, and other essential needs.

regional.name: Aging Ahead
regional.what: The Area Agency on Aging for St. Louis, St. Charles, Franklin, and Jefferson counties, connecting older adults and caregivers to meals, in-home services, and benefits counseling.

regional.name: Community Council of St. Charles County
regional.what: A St. Charles County hub with a searchable resource directory for social services, food, housing, and disaster-planning resources across the tri-county area.

regional.name: Start Here STL
regional.what: A St. Louis City and County resource guide pointing people to food pantries, housing, employment, medical care, legal aid, and support for veterans, immigrants, and youth.

regional.name: Missouri 211 Resource Directory (United Way)
regional.what: Searchable Missouri directory — food, housing, utility, health, and mental-health services by ZIP code or county.

regional.name: Aging Best (Central Missouri Area Agency on Aging)
regional.what: The aging and disability resource center for central Missouri, offering information, referrals, nutrition, caregiver support, and independent-living services for seniors and adults with disabilities.

regional.name: Heart of Missouri United Way 211
regional.what: A free 24/7 phone and online directory connecting mid-Missouri residents to local help with food, housing, rent, childcare, counseling, and job training.

regional.name: Love Columbia Resource Directory
regional.what: A curated single-point-of-access directory of housing, food, crisis, mental health, medical, and employment resources for Columbia, Boone County, and nearby mid-Missouri towns.

regional.name: Northeast Missouri Area Agency on Aging
regional.what: The aging and disability resource center serving a 16-county Northeast Missouri region (including Hannibal and Kirksville) with referrals, in-home services, nutrition, transportation, and caregiver support.

regional.name: Missouri Ozarks Community Action — Find Help
regional.what: County-lookup find-help locator routing South-Central and Ozarks Missouri residents to their local Community Action Agency for assistance programs.

regional.name: Ozarks Region Community Resource Directory (Christian County Library)
regional.what: Library-maintained Ozarks-region directory organizing local services by need (basic needs, mental health, substance abuse, domestic violence, senior, financial/legal) with a printable PDF.

regional.name: The Alliance of Southwest Missouri — Resource Guide
regional.what: Searchable directory of 248+ community resources (health, housing, food, employment, senior, veteran, LGBTQ+) across the Joplin/Four-States and Southwest Missouri region.

regional.name: United Way Ozarks Region — Get Help / 211
regional.what: Springfield-based regional 211 hub connecting Ozarks residents to local food, housing, healthcare, crisis, and veteran/cancer assistance services.

regional.name: 211 Kansas (United Ways of Kansas)
regional.what: Searchable statewide directory connecting Kansans in Topeka, Lawrence, Manhattan, Salina and beyond to food, housing, utility assistance, health and other local services.

regional.name: Douglas County Senior Resource Center (Lawrence, KS)
regional.what: Aging and disability resource hub helping Lawrence/Douglas County seniors find Medicare counseling, legal and financial aid, meals, transportation and in-home support.

regional.name: United Way of Kaw Valley
regional.what: Regional Topeka/Lawrence United Way with a 'Find Help Near Me' / 211 navigator linking residents to nearby community services.

regional.name: Ellis County Community Resource Directory (United Way of Ellis County)
regional.what: A Hays-based human-services directory helping western Kansas residents find childcare, counseling, employment, food, housing, and health services.

regional.name: South Central Kansas Area Agency on Aging (SCKAAA)
regional.what: Regional aging and disability resource agency serving ten south-central Kansas counties (including Reno/Hutchinson and McPherson) with services for older and disabled adults.

regional.name: United Way 211 (United Way of the Plains)
regional.what: Free Wichita-based 211 referral service connecting south-central and statewide Kansas residents to food, housing, healthcare, and family-support resources.

regional.name: Western Kansas Community Foundation
regional.what: A Garden City-based community foundation hub listing local nonprofit and community resources serving Finney County and western Kansas.
